scope_description: All 12 unreviewed candidates before the v0.1.44 release (includes high-risk fresh-session-handoff)

excluded.reason: release 0.1.43 commit — not a review candidate
stdin-first-nudge — separate tiny docs change this session, not among the 12

head: 0847310f7f99c13a4a51f6227b4e12227c9471b4

reviewers.focus: auth, secrets, injection, permissions, data exposure, fail-closed guards
missing edge cases, regression paths, weak assertions
CLI command surface, registry<->handler bijection, public shapes
fail-closed state transitions, spawn/exec, error handling

reviewer_manifest.note: .bee/bin/lib is a byte-identical vendored mirror of skills/bee-hive/templates/lib; reviewed at source only.

findings.summary: cells.add manifest example was non-runnable (shell pipeline + placeholder JSON), breaking test_bee_cli.mjs (109/12)
findings.what: examples[0] set to `printf '%s' '[{...cell...}]' | bee cells add --stdin --json`; registry contract requires every example to be a runnable `bee <group> <verb>` string executed by test_bee_cli.mjs, and cells.add's example must create the demo-1 fixture the rest of the CLI-test chain depends on.
findings.why: The first advertised example is what a Claude/OpenAI agent copies from the --help manifest; it fails when run, and it silently invalidated the 'every example is executed and asserted not to error' guarantee the whole registry rests on.
findings.failure_scenario: Copying the advertised example and piping it returns {"error":"add: input is not valid JSON."}; the CLI contract test cascades to 109 passed / 12 failed.
findings.fix: Reverted examples[0] to 'bee cells add --file cell-demo-1.json --json'; kept stdin-first nudge in the non-executed description + 07-contracts.md; source+mirror byte-identical.
findings.resolution: Fixed in commit 434817b; delta re-review clean (test_bee_cli.mjs 121/0, full verify green). Defect class swept: the passing suite executes every registry example.

decision.summary: Pre-release review of 12 unreviewed candidates for v0.1.44. In-scope features: 0 P1. One P1 found at the release tip (cells.add non-runnable manifest example, introduced this session) was fixed in 434817b with a clean delta re-review (test_bee_cli.mjs 121/0). 9 P2 + 6 P3 filed to backlog, non-blocking. User approved merge + release with the P2s tracked.
